signal/CTRL_BREAK_EVENT.name: CTRL_BREAK_EVENT
signal/CTRL_BREAK_EVENT.description: The signal corresponding to the Ctrl+Break keystroke event. This signal can only be used with os.kill(). Availability: Windows. Added in version 3.2.

info.excerpt: The signal corresponding to the Ctrl+Break keystroke event. This signal can only be used with os.kill(). Availability: Windows. Added in version 3.2.

signal/CTRL_C_EVENT.name: CTRL_C_EVENT
signal/CTRL_C_EVENT.description: The signal corresponding to the Ctrl+C keystroke event. This signal can only be used with os.kill(). Availability: Windows. Added in version 3.2.

info.excerpt: The signal corresponding to the Ctrl+C keystroke event. This signal can only be used with os.kill(). Availability: Windows. Added in version 3.2.
